questions.question: Create a scatter plot to visualize the relationship between 'Age' and 'Salary' in the 'employees' dataset. What type of relationship do you observe?
Using the 'exam_results' dataset, create a histogram to show the distribution of 'Marks' in different batches. What can you infer from the histogram about the distribution of marks?
questions.hint: Use base R graphics or ggplot2 package

questions.question: Plot a bar chart to compare the number of students who passed or failed in two different exams. Which exam had a higher passing percentage?
questions.hint: Use base R graphics or ggplot2 package
